name: SC-001: Valid Login Redirects to Inventory
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce and verify the product inventory page heading is visible.

name: SC-002: Cart Badge Updates on Add to Cart
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, submit the login form, and verify the Add to cart button for Sauce Labs Backpack is visible.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the Add to cart button for Sauce Labs Backpack, and verify the cart badge shows 1.

name: SC-003: Product Name Opens Detail Page
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, submit the login form, and verify the Add to cart button is visible on the Sauce Labs Backpack product page.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the product name Sauce Labs Backpack, and verify the product detail page shows the Add to cart button.

name: SC-004: Sort Price Low to High Shows Cheapest First
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, select Price (low to high) from the sort dropdown, and verify the price $7.99 is visible.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, select Price (low to high) from the sort dropdown, and verify the price $7.99 is visible as the first product.

name: SC-005: Cart Page Lists Added Item
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, add the Sauce Labs Backpack to the cart, and verify the cart badge shows 1.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the cart icon, and verify the item name Sauce Labs Backpack is visible on the cart page.
